prompt_metadata.description: Create a realistic portrait of a woman from the original file, matching facial structure 100% under nightclub neon lighting.

beauty.label: Beautiful
beauty.description: The subject is described as beautiful.

identity_reference.description: Mouth, nose, eyebrows, eyes, and facial structure must match the original file 100% without any distortion.

eyes.description: Eyes match the reference file exactly with no distortion.

eyebrows.description: Eyebrows match the reference file exactly with no distortion.

nose.description: Nose matches the reference file exactly with no distortion.

lips.value: match original file 100% and wearing red lipstick
lips.description: Mouth/lips match reference file exactly with no distortion; wearing red lipstick.

smile.description: A gentle smile on the subject's face.

expression.description: Looking directly at the camera with a cute expression.

texture.description: Fair and smooth skin; skin appears radiant, smooth, and bright under lighting, with realistic skin texture.

makeup.description: Red lipstick applied to the lips.

lighting_effects.value: illuminated brightly by the red light, strong neon highlights on her hair
lighting_effects.description: Hair is illuminated brightly by red ambient/neon light.

top.description: A white off-shoulder one-shoulder top that drapes elegantly over her shoulders.

fabric.description: High detail of fabric texture and folds.

hand_position.value: left hand touching face near cheek/ear, right hand on table near a drink
hand_position.description: Left hand raised to gently touch the side of her face near cheek and ear; right hand rests on table near a drink.

eye_contact.description: Direct eye contact with the viewer/camera.

location.value: inside a vibrant crowded bar or nightclub
location.description: The setting is indoor, in a lively bar or nightclub.

props.value: green glass bottle, glass with a purple straw, smartphone, table, drink
props.description: Foreground items on the table: green glass bottle, glass with purple straw, smartphone, and other items.

background.value: blurred figures of other people in the club
background.description: Background shows blurred silhouettes of other clubgoers under red ambient lighting.

key_light.description: Strong flash lighting used to make the skin appear radiant, smooth, and bright.

neon.value: strong dramatic red and pink neon lighting
neon.description: Red and pink neon casting a warm glow across the scene.

ambient.value: warm red-pink color tone, rich saturated red environment
ambient.description: Warm red-pink ambient lighting with soft lighting on the subject.

highlights.value: strong neon highlights on her hair and skin
highlights.description: Neon highlights reflecting off the subject's hair and skin.

brand.description: Shot on a modern mirrorless camera.

perspective.description: Shot taken from a slightly low angle.

aperture.description: Shallow depth of field creating soft bokeh blur in the foreground and background.

details.value: high detail, realistic skin texture and fabric details
details.description: Very high detail in skin and clothing fabric.
